title: Last Time - Life Series Mod Addon
description: A life series addon that randomizes how many hours you have! 8-30 hours chosen randomly!
body:
Archived due to the functionality of this mod being added to the main mod

This adds the Last Life lives rolling into Limited Life!

#
**YOU MUST HAVE THE LIFE SERIES MOD FOR THIS TO WORK!!**

---
**THIS IS FOR LIMITED LIFE**

---

By default, the amount of hours you can get are anywhere from 8-30 hours!
This Datapack assumes you are using the default config, the title colours will NOT change if you change the life Series Mod config. To change the colours or min/max times you will have to unzip the file and then change the .mcfunction files

![this is a modified version of 'No Gen AI' Seal ( https://www.polygon-treehouse.com/no-gen-ai-seal ) for Datapacks  This assures that I used NO AI in the creation of this Datapack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9f9e74e29cb9218b22d3a5721c7b9556e1c2364.png)
